Class SQLManager

java.lang.Object
jdbc.SQLManager
public class SQLManager extends Object
Manages SQL database connection and basic initialization operations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SQLManager()
    Default constructor that initializes all managers with a database connection.
